query:
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, 
  spreadAwayBetsPct, spreadAwayMoneyPct,
  totalOverBetsPct, totalOverMoneyPct,
  mlAwayBetsPct, mlAwayMoneyPct,
  rlAwayBetsPct, rlAwayMoneyPct
FROM games 
WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND gameDate = '2026-03-30' 
ORDER BY id 
LIMIT 5;
command:

  totalOverBetsPct, totalOverMoneyPct,
  mlAwayBetsPct, mlAwayMoneyPct,
  rlAwayBetsPct, rlAwayMoneyPct
FROM games 
WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND gameDate = '2026-03-30' 
ORDER BY id 
LIMIT 5;
